lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, you must be a traveller.

lines.speaker: Kaston
lines.text: You are wrong this time, adventurer. I'm actually from Ice Mountain.

lines.speaker: Kaston
lines.text: I always wanted to visit Lovakengj to see the Blast Mine. This year I finally saved up enough to travel here.

lines.speaker: Kaston
lines.text: However, the war with the lizardmen means Lovakengj is dangerous to get to from here. I'll need to go the long way round.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think about this place?

lines.speaker: Kaston
lines.text: To be honest, Shayzien is a bit boring for visitors. It's all about war and military things.

lines.speaker: Kaston
lines.text: The only place I would recommend is the Cloak and Stagger. You'll find some pretty good drinks there.
